sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n52857" key="kalpasmo/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">καλπ-ασμός</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n52857.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">trotting</tr_>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ὁ ἐν ἀναβολῇ κ</foreign>. <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Philum.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:45:29:36" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">45.29.36</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
